metadata.description: TradingView Claude Code plugin — multi-timeframe K-line history, technical indicators (MACD/RSI/KDJ/Bollinger), and comprehensive market data via persistent headless Chrome

plugins.name: tradingview
plugins.description: TradingView data access with persistent headless Chrome — K-line/candlestick history (1m to monthly), built-in technical indicators (MACD, RSI, KDJ, Bollinger Bands, EMA/SMA), spot quotes, options chains, screener, news, watchlists, alerts, chart state, and screenshots.
